report.summary: Standup v21 Apr 3: 13 agent runs since v20 across all 6 types. Build added 4 new guides (Jupiter DEX, Crypto KYC, ZK Coprocessors, Polygon AggLayer). Community drafted tweets #480-484 + newsletter v49. Design audited UX on promoted pages. EOD v13 reports 684 published slugs, 117 uncommitted files, deploy still frozen at e3f63fc. Total today: 86 runs = $7,496 human-equiv. Deploy debt now at 31st escalation.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE v20 → v21: 13 agent runs across all 6 types — build×2, community×3, design×3, eod×3, publish×1, standup×1. Heavy activity in content creation and community drafting.

BUILD OUTPUT: 4 new learn guides scaffolded — Jupiter DEX Aggregator & Solana Trading (824 lines), Crypto KYC/AML/Travel Rule Compliance (936 lines), ZK Coprocessors & Verifiable Compute (Axiom, Brevis, RISC Zero), Polygon AggLayer Unified Liquidity (CDK, POL token). All with full SEO metadata + Article/FAQPage structured data.

COMMUNITY OUTPUT: 5 tweets drafted (#480-484) covering Aave V4 launch, Liberation Day +1yr tariff resilience, ETH Foundation 70K staking, veTokenomics spotlight, F&G 9 + stablecoin dry powder. Newsletter v49 themed 'DeFi Renaissance'. 3 new social cards.
DESIGN OUTPUT: UX audit on 4 promoted learn pages — added smooth scrolling to all 4, verified OG image coverage (104 SVGs total), identified architectural UX debt for future refactor.

CONTENT PIPELINE: 684 published slugs in registry (up from 652 at v20). 573 have valid page.tsx. 110 learn page dirs in Degen0x app. 93 staging pages available for future batches. Publish queue remains CLEARED at 0.
MARKET: BTC ~$66,650 (stable). F&G 9 (Extreme Fear, 4+ days). Stablecoin supply $316B ATH. Good Friday — thin liquidity continues. No new market events.
EGRESS: Sandbox blocks CoinGecko, GSC, Vercel, alternative.me. All market/traffic data carried forward.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SINCE v20: 13 agent runs completed — build (2 runs: ZK Coprocessors + AggLayer, Jupiter DEX + KYC), community (3 runs: tweets, newsletter, social cards), design (3 runs: UX audit + smooth scrolling), eod (3 runs: QA cycle-close), publish (1 run), standup (this run).
TODAY'S FULL AGENT ACTIVITY: 86 total runs — standup×21 ($945), build×17 ($3,961), community×16 ($656), design×14 ($840), eod×13 ($819), publish×5 ($275). Total human-equiv: $7,496.

P0 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (31ST ESCALATION): Deploy debt CRITICAL++. 117 uncommitted files with ~11,400 insertions in working tree. 684 published slugs in registry but production frozen at e3f63fc (Apr 2). Publish queue cleared. Every cycle adds more uncommitted work. JEFE ACTION REQUIRED.

P1 — STAGING PIPELINE: 93 pages remain in Degen0x staging. Queue cleared since v20. Next step: select 5-10 page batches from staging with full QA (metadata + JSON-LD + breadcrumbs) matching the v20 quality standard.

P2 — TECHNICAL DEBT: 111 phantom published slugs (missing page.tsx, up from 108 at v20). defi-yields API still has no fallback data. 0/6 public routes have rate limiting. 4 pre-existing TS errors (non-blocking via ignoreBuildErrors).

P3 — NEW CONTENT READY: 4 new guides built since v20 need publishing pipeline: Jupiter DEX, Crypto KYC, ZK Coprocessors, Polygon AggLayer. Plus 2 from eod-v13: Glamsterdam, Restaking Wars. 6 guides waiting for next publish batch.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — COMMIT + DEPLOY (P0 — 31ST ESCALATION): 86 agent runs = $7,496 human-equiv today with zero production output. 117 uncommitted files. 684 published pages in registry vs what's live. Every hour of delay = content freshness decay. The 4 new DeFi guides (Jupiter, KYC, ZK Coprocessors, AggLayer) are time-sensitive narratives. Deploy urgency: MAXIMUM.

PRIORITY 2 — BATCH NEW GUIDES INTO PUBLISH PIPELINE: 6 guides built since last publish (Jupiter DEX, Crypto KYC, ZK Coprocessors, Polygon AggLayer, Glamsterdam, Restaking Wars). These should be added to publish queue → promoted with full SEO QA → committed with next deploy. Meanwhile, begin pulling from 93 staging pages.

PRIORITY 3 — DEFI-YIELDS API HARDENING: Only degraded route out of 6. No in-memory cache, no fallback data, no rate limiting. If DefiLlama goes down, this route fails silently. Fix before next deploy to avoid production incident.
